title: Malik's Rainbow Snacks
synopsis: Baby Malik discovers colors through yummy snacks, from red apples to purple grapes, learning about the rainbow of foods around him.

pages.text: Malik loves to eat! Look at all the colors on his plate.

illustration.description: A joyful boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes sits at a colorful table with paint splatter drips around the edges. The scene is dominated by rainbow colors in a splashy painterly style with finger paint aesthetic, showing a plate full of colorful foods.
illustration.alt: Malik sitting at a table with colorful foods

pages.text: Red apple! Crunch, crunch! Malik takes a big bite of the red apple.

illustration.description: A boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes holds a bright red apple. The scene is dominated by vibrant red colors with splashy painterly strokes and paint splatter drips, creating a joyful pure color exploration with finger paint aesthetic.
illustration.alt: Malik holding and eating a red apple

pages.text: Orange carrot! Crunch! The orange carrot is sweet and good.

illustration.description: A boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes munches on an orange carrot stick. The scene bursts with dominant orange colors in splashy painterly style with paint splatter drips and sensory visual elements, using finger paint aesthetic for joyful color exploration.
illustration.alt: Malik eating an orange carrot stick

pages.text: Yellow banana! Yum! Malik peels the yellow banana carefully.

illustration.description: A boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes peels a bright yellow banana. The scene is filled with dominant yellow colors in splashy painterly strokes with paint splatter drips, creating a sensory visual experience with joyful finger paint aesthetic color exploration.

pages.text: Green grapes! Pop! The little green grapes are juicy and fun.

illustration.description: A boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes holds a bunch of green grapes. The scene is dominated by vibrant green colors with splashy painterly technique and paint splatter drips, showing joyful pure color exploration with finger paint aesthetic and sensory visual appeal.

pages.text: Blue blueberries! Tiny and sweet! Malik picks up the small blue berries.

illustration.description: A boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes picks up small blueberries with his fingers. The scene is dominated by beautiful blue colors in splashy painterly style with paint splatter drips, creating sensory visual joy through finger paint aesthetic color exploration.

pages.text: Purple grapes! So good! Malik smiles as he eats the purple grapes. Colors are everywhere!

illustration.description: A smiling boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes enjoys purple grapes with rainbow colors swirling around him. The scene features dominant purple with splashy painterly strokes, paint splatter drips, and joyful finger paint aesthetic creating pure color exploration and sensory visual delight.
illustration.alt: Malik happily eating purple grapes with rainbow colors around him

metadata.illustrationStyle: rainbow colors, splashy painterly, one color dominant per scene, paint splatter drips, sensory visual, joyful pure color, finger paint aesthetic, color exploration

questions.question: What color is the apple Malik eats?
questions.explanation: The apple is red! Malik takes a big bite of the red apple.

questions.question: What does Malik do with the banana?
questions.explanation: Malik peels the yellow banana carefully before eating it.

questions.question: Which fruit is tiny and blue?
questions.explanation: The blueberries are tiny and blue! Malik picks them up with his fingers.
